reasons: Mathilda helps Paquito enter, reposition, or exit after committing his close-range combo.
Paquito can convert Mathilda's shield and movement support into stronger skirmish pressure.

proof.summary: Mathilda gives Paquito extra access and safety, while Paquito turns that mobility into close-range burst and control pressure.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda saves Guiding Wind for Paquito's engage or disengage.
Paquito has combo resources ready before using the movement support.
failureCases: Paquito dives before Mathilda can support him.
Mathilda uses Guiding Wind on another teammate first.
Enemy hard crowd control locks Paquito before he can reset position.

reasons: Mathilda gives Claude another movement and shield option when he enters a teamfight.
Claude benefits from Mathilda's support because his damage window can require aggressive positioning.

proof.summary: Mathilda supports Claude's repositioning and survival, giving him a safer entry or exit route during damage windows.
worksBestWhen: Claude waits until Mathilda is close enough to support him.
Mathilda keeps an escape or follow-up route available after Claude commits.
failureCases: Claude enters while Mathilda is too far away.
Enemy hard control is saved for Claude's entry.
Mathilda is forced to use mobility defensively before Claude commits.

reasons: Mathilda can support Yu Zhong's backline dive with shield and movement follow-up.
Yu Zhong creates pressure inside the enemy formation, giving Mathilda a clear teammate to reinforce.

proof.summary: Mathilda helps Yu Zhong stay connected to the fight after he dives, while Yu Zhong creates space for the team to collapse.
worksBestWhen: Yu Zhong dives after Mathilda can follow the fight direction.
Mathilda uses shield and movement to support Yu Zhong's second entry or reset.
failureCases: Yu Zhong dives too deep without team follow-up.
Mathilda is zoned away before Guiding Wind is useful.
Enemy burst kills Yu Zhong before the sustain fight starts.

reasons: Mathilda gives Beatrix extra safety when she needs to reposition after choosing a weapon angle.
Beatrix benefits from shield and movement support because her damage reliability depends on spacing and timing.

proof.summary: Mathilda protects Beatrix's positioning, while Beatrix uses the safer angle to keep dealing weapon-based damage.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda stays close enough to offer escape or reposition.
Beatrix uses the movement support to reset spacing instead of overchasing.
failureCases: Beatrix is caught before Mathilda can cast.
Mathilda leaves before Beatrix's damage window.
Enemy dive has multiple crowd-control layers.

reasons: Mathilda can help Aamon reach a target or escape after a burst attempt.
Aamon benefits from Mathilda's shield because his pickoff pattern often requires a risky commit.

proof.summary: Mathilda gives Aamon a safer entry or exit path, while Aamon supplies the burst finish after the movement setup.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda supports Aamon after he has identified an isolated target.
Aamon has shards available before committing.
failureCases: Aamon enters without enough damage setup.
Mathilda's mobility is used before the assassination window.
Enemy reveal or hard crowd control stops Aamon's re-entry.
